story: I binged on my secret stash until my tummy hurt and fell into a Chocolate Land dream where my chocolatey mom and dad said treats are special and too much makes the world small. While I slept, Dad sat in the hallway and messaged Dr. Lee: “Can you see Fernanda this afternoon?” The dentist set a 3 p.m. checkup. The walls un-melted; I woke in my room, wrappers everywhere. I cleaned them up, went to the kitchen, and hugged Dad. “I’m sorry,” I said. “I want lots of foods, not only chocolate.”
implausible_knowledge: While I slept, Dad sat in the hallway and messaged Dr. Lee: “Can you see Fernanda this afternoon?” The dentist set a 3 p.m. checkup.
question: After she hugs Dad and apologizes, what will Fernanda most likely do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Put on her shoes to get ready to go to the dentist for the 3 p.m. appointment.
answer_without_knowledge: Ask Dad for a small, healthy snack like fruit.
